name: com.twenty/twenty
title: Twenty CRM
description: Read and write your Twenty CRM data - companies, people, opportunities, tasks, notes and any custom objects - from AI assistants. Tools are discovered at runtime and scoped to the authenticated workspace.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Optional. Bearer <api-key> for static API-key auth. Omit to use OAuth 2.1, which is auto-discovered from the workspace host's /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource and /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server.
